---
title: "00 · Introduction"
subtitle: "Tier 7 — Masters Specialisation Tracks · Capstone lessons across Research, AI/ML, Game Dev, Databases, Systems, Encryption — and a final glimpse of the Langlands Program"
---

## What this tier is for

This is the **summit**. Tier 7 takes the foundations built across
six tiers and applies them to mathematical research, modern AI,
graphics, databases, systems, and cryptography — finishing with a
glimpse of the deepest unification programme in mathematics.

Each lesson is a doorway: not exhaustive, but a faithful introduction
to a graduate-level subject. The goal is to *equip you to keep
learning* in any of these directions.

By the end of Tier 7 you can:

- Read **measure theory** and **topology** at a graduate level.
- Understand the structure of **Galois theory**.
- Reason about **statistical learning** (PAC, VC), **manifolds in ML**,
  and **reinforcement learning theory**.
- Work with **differential geometry**, **quaternions**, and modern 3D
  graphics structures.
- Reason about **relational algebra** and database query optimisation.
- Analyse system performance via **queueing theory** and verify
  correctness via **formal methods**.
- Understand modern cryptography: **algebraic number theory**,
  **elliptic curves**, and **lattice-based post-quantum** schemes.
- Glimpse the **Langlands Program** — one of the great unifications
  of mathematics.

## The lessons by track

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
    A[Research:<br/>01 Measure<br/>02 Topology<br/>03 Galois]
    B[AI/ML:<br/>04 SLT<br/>05 Manifolds<br/>06 RL Theory]
    C[Game Dev:<br/>07 Diff Geom<br/>08 Quaternions]
    D[Databases:<br/>09 Relational]
    E[Systems:<br/>10 Queueing<br/>11 Formal]
    F[Encryption:<br/>12 ANT<br/>13 ECC<br/>14 Lattice]
    G[Finale:<br/>15 Langlands]
```

## Lesson list

1. [**01 · Measure Theory and Lebesgue Integration**](01-measure-theory/index.qmd) — *Research*
2. [**02 · Topology**](02-topology/index.qmd) — *Research*
3. [**03 · Galois Theory**](03-galois-theory/index.qmd) — *Research*
4. [**04 · Statistical Learning Theory**](04-statistical-learning-theory/index.qmd) — *AI/ML*
5. [**05 · Manifold Methods for ML**](05-manifold-methods/index.qmd) — *AI/ML*
6. [**06 · Reinforcement Learning Theory**](06-rl-theory/index.qmd) — *AI/ML*
7. [**07 · Differential Geometry**](07-differential-geometry/index.qmd) — *Game Dev / Research*
8. [**08 · Quaternions and 3D Rotations**](08-quaternions/index.qmd) — *Game Dev*
9. [**09 · Relational Algebra and Query Optimisation**](09-relational-algebra/index.qmd) — *Databases*
10. [**10 · Queueing Theory and Performance Modelling**](10-queueing-theory/index.qmd) — *Systems*
11. [**11 · Formal Methods**](11-formal-methods/index.qmd) — *Systems*
12. [**12 · Algebraic Number Theory**](12-algebraic-number-theory/index.qmd) — *Encryption*
13. [**13 · Elliptic Curves and ECC**](13-elliptic-curves/index.qmd) — *Encryption*
14. [**14 · Lattice-Based Post-Quantum Cryptography**](14-lattice-crypto/index.qmd) — *Encryption*
15. [**15 · The Langlands Program**](15-langlands-program/index.qmd) — *Capstone*

::: {.callout-note}
This page reflects the snapshot of `_curriculum.yml` at the time of build.
Lesson statuses there are the source of truth.
:::
